---
layout: default
title: "National Political and Legislative Brief: July 8, 2026"
date: 2026-07-08T16:13:51.822974+00:00
summary: "PM Modi addresses Indonesian Parliament, Parliament passes transgender rights legislation, and key electoral and judicial developments unfold nationwide"
run_time_ist: "9:43PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:43PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>PM Modi’s historic address:</strong> Prime Minister Narendra Modi became the first Indian Prime Minister to address the Indonesian Parliament, emphasizing India&#x27;s commitment to development over expansionism and calling for stronger bilateral ties.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPa3JGVEVEY0RJY2R3ZXFJQW1HU2k1eWtDYTdCUkt0ZGY1S0llUm9HSERzTVZsVTNnNm8yMnNoX0JxSjVDN3NCYmtOb3FjQ2FXQWw2MTdIaUl2dmh2THVNTm9Lc3lnNjREQThLNEMyUzhlR3E3NnVJRUtVLVFBeng3clp2OTVPUE9iR0RlSVVIUjVlMnl2U2NlVk1OdW0tVHh6S0VnWFFlYnZybVYzcTh6SGZ6cVY?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxOcU5YNEVQWjlUYmNobXBVZF9jd1B3aEh3ZUFlX1QzZE1hVmQ1ZVlmTGZIXzlHNllsZUVvdUJ3czlqRHNYdEtNRW50ckdVQmw1NGxrNm4tbl9CQ2stZVRIZFdYcjVKaHVfX2JYNXowWjFQaVdJaGtzVGI3bW1YS1BEX3lDejZVNFFpX3ZYV0h2OUFWMk1pOHNIUTVJdmxBZmFyVi13UHYxVWstTXVFNm41Nm1UZ1pSM0RKYmc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative milestones:</strong> Parliament passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, following its approval in the Rajya Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxQU3ZPV0tBQ0k0Q2ZRTFZWZ1JVTjIyOWY4U2VVcEtUMzNURDBlSUdheU1TamkwWWZSQTczRXR2ZUttTUZkdnBJS2JhdFRQTmlIamtZZEpEQ2ROOVJISm9OSXhEYk84TmUyZUJOTHgzci1PaVFSeTlHMWpzQV9rOWEwWHNualRibzRieVJzSXNRY1ZDdVVsSGhGdEVFRjZXeEhoSnFkS2RnbUNpRFFfaFFiWEQwQUVSbGZiZW91ZFpnTjZOLVF0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral outcomes and disputes:</strong> BJP&#x27;s Sanjay Bhatia and Congress&#x27;s Karamvir Singh Boudh were elected to the Rajya Sabha from Haryana, while the BJP and JD(S) formally alleged irregularities in Karnataka&#x27;s voter roll revision.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxNT3V5YWExT3MtWkhqcmVod3l0V3lGNWk0Y0J2ODNHdDJBbFFEQ1BXTEFsRTB4ZDJhbGZVWnp6cWRlSWgxekN2Njh5RkItYXh0azNnUWdQb0dOOE9TWGJ4a0dkOUViSWVJTGh0akU5X2QtWEZrc3NaV1VENlQzVGlzQ2NFNVc4VjNXVDdhM1BPdjhEWFQyRmppZF9uQzBibTE3bWE4cWhlem5kRGM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial and constitutional challenges:</strong> The Supreme Court has issued notice regarding a plea for fresh CBSE Class 12 exams for Gulf students and is reviewing a Tamil Nadu petition challenging a Madras High Court order on reservation for religious converts.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE93VjZkQmR6ajZWZDF4YVpRNnNmWDh2Skp6M01rQi0wU3Vod0FjWTdudE5hYXhuVmVlVzFWSkdyclAwemRiNnFYdEFuTDRodkdyN0hRRlZxeFh1RW5ucjQ2MkZVRzRaVFRrWGJBZDVUbldZYTh1ZWQwbzJEYzJUNVU?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W17</a></span></li>
</ul>
